feature_register_checkout_desc: Fast checkout with barcode scanning or manual search. Split payments, layaways, discounts, refunds, and digital receipts in any currency.
feature_multi_currency_desc: Set your store currency to GBP, USD, EUR, NGN, KES, AED, INR, ZAR or 150+ others. Exchange rates, symbol formatting, and decimal rules handled automatically.
feature_inventory_desc: Real-time stock levels across every branch. Low-stock alerts, stock transfers, batch updates, and AI-powered reorder recommendations.
feature_multi_branch_desc: Run multiple locations — in the same country or across borders — from one dashboard. Per-branch currency, tax, inventory, and staff settings.
feature_staff_shifts_desc: Role-based access for cashiers and managers. Shift open/close with cash reconciliation, OTP login, and per-cashier performance tracking.
feature_tax_compliance_desc: VAT, GST, sales tax, and custom local tax rates. Multi-jurisdiction rules, consolidated reports, and filing-ready previews. Syncs to Xero and QuickBooks.
feature_localisation_desc: Date formats, number separators, address formats, and receipt layouts automatically match your country. Right-to-left language support included.
feature_payments_desc: Accept card, cash, mobile money (M-Pesa, MTN, Airtel), QR pay, and split payments. Works offline and syncs when reconnected.
feature_ai_intelligence_desc: Anomaly detection on transactions, AI-driven supplier recommendations, sales pattern insights, and demand forecasting — all from your PoS data.
feature_reports_desc: Daily, weekly, and monthly sales reports broken down by product, cashier, branch, and payment method. Export in your local currency.
feature_privacy_desc: GDPR, NDPR, POPIA, and PDPA ready. One-click customer data export, deletion requests, consent logging, and configurable retention policies.
feature_works_everywhere_desc: Runs on any device — iPad at the counter, Android phone for pop-ups, or desktop in the back office. No proprietary hardware, no lock-in.
workflow_1_desc: Cashier logs in with OTP, counts the float, and the register is live.
workflow_2_desc: Scan barcodes or search products. Split payments, apply discounts, issue digital receipts.
workflow_3_desc: Every transaction feeds your intelligence layer — anomaly alerts, restock suggestions, margin analysis.
workflow_4_desc: Close the shift, reconcile cash, and the day's data flows into your reports and accounting sync.
demo_step_1_desc: Point the camera at any barcode or QR code. No typing.
demo_step_2_desc: Product matched in your inventory in under a second.
demo_step_3_desc: Line item appears with price, quantity, and tax — automatically.
demo_step_4_desc: Card, cash, or mobile wallet. Receipt sent digitally.
hero_subtitle: No barcode gun. No manual entry. Just point your phone camera at any product and it's added to the basket — inventory updated instantly across every branch.
hero_pricing_note: {price}/seat per month · Full POS included · No special hardware · No Shopify needed
demo_subtitle: No manual entry. Point, scan, checkout — the entire sale takes seconds.
demo_no_signup: No sign-up needed — just hit play.
features_heading: Built to sell anywhere in the world
features_subtitle: One platform. Any country, any currency, any tax system. No extra setup — just pick your locale and start selling.
features_global_desc: Set your store currency once. Prices, receipts, tax reports, and accounting exports all follow. Switch branches to different currencies without losing a thing.
features_tax_desc: VAT · GST · Sales Tax · Withholding Tax · Custom rates — configured per branch, per country.
sectors_subtitle: One platform, six sectors. The PoS adapts its tiles, workflows, and intelligence to match your type of business.
sectors_shared_note: All sectors share inventory, staff, branches, tax, AI, and multi-currency.
compare_askbiz_1: Ring up sales + AI anomaly alerts
compare_askbiz_3: Auto reports synced to Xero / QB
compare_askbiz_5: AI pattern insights from every sale
walkthrough_heading_line1: Add a cashier or inventory user
walkthrough_subtitle: No IT team. No training manuals. Pick a name, set a role, share an OTP — your staff is live.
walkthrough_otp_note: Staff log in with a one-time OTP — no password needed. You control who can access what.
walkthrough_share_code: Share this one-time code with your staff member
walkthrough_live_desc: Logged in 12 seconds ago · Ready to take payments
walkthrough_fact_1_desc: Average setup time per staff member
walkthrough_fact_2_desc: No passwords — staff get a one-time code
walkthrough_fact_3_desc: Manager · Cashier · Inventory — set once, controlled forever
pricing_subtitle: Add PoS to any Growth or Business plan.
pricing_desc: Each seat is one register or device. Add as many as you need.
pricing_free_note: Free plan always available · No credit card needed
cta_subtitle: Set up your first register in under 5 minutes. No hardware needed — just sign in and start selling.
